use_cases: Form input for selecting options from a predefined list of choices
Dropdown selection for filtering data in tables or dashboards
Settings configuration panels where users choose preferences
E-commerce product filtering by category, size, or price range
Navigation menu selections in nested hierarchical structures
ai_summary: A customizable select dropdown component built on Radix UI with support for custom indicators, keyboard navigation, and visual states including focus, disabled, and error validation. Features context-based indicator positioning control and integrates smooth transitions with chevron and check icons for open/selected states. Designed for accessibility with full ARIA support and focus ring styling.
